info.title: Klaviyo API (Beta)
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Get all translations in an account.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `translations:read`

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description:
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15.pre/reference/api-overview#filtering
Allowed field(s)/operator(s):
`id`: `any`, `equals`
`resource_type`: `equals`
`channel`: `equals`
`related_resource_id`: `equals`

post.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-04-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Create a translation.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `10/s`
Steady: `150/m` **Scopes:** `translations:write`

parameters.name: additional-fields[translation]
parameters.description: Request additional fields not included by default in the response. Supported values: 'values'

values.description: The translation values for this resource. Each entry contains the value block ID, its source text, and a map of target locale codes to translated strings. Only returned when requested via additional-fields[translation]=values.

id.description: The ID of the universal content
The composite ID of the translation in format {resource_type}::{qualifier}::{collection_id}

source_locale.description: The source locale for this translation

target_locales.description: The target locales for this translation

fallback_locale.description: The fallback locale for this translation

created.description: The datetime when this translation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this translation was updated

action_type.description: The action type for a push notification action button.

badge_config.description: A push message variation's badge config.

push_type.description: A push message variation's push type.

text_message_type.description:
A sms message variation's text message type.

Values match the Django OmniSMSTextMessageType (MESSAGE_FORMAT_*)
    constants.

editor_type.description:
`editor_type` has a fixed set of values:
* SYSTEM_DRAGGABLE: indicates a drag-and-drop editor template
* SIMPLE: A rich text editor template
* CODE: A custom HTML template
* USER_DRAGGABLE: A hybrid template, using custom HTML in the drag-and-drop editor

html.description: The rendered HTML of the template

amp.description: The AMP version of the template. Requires AMP Email to be enabled to access in-app. Refer to the AMP Email setup guide at https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/send_amp_emails_in_klaviyo

created.description: The date the template was created in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm)

updated.description: The date the template was updated in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS.mmmmmm)

source_locale.description: The source locale for this translation

target_locales.description: The target locales for this translation

fallback_locale.description: The fallback locale for this translation

source_locale.description: The source locale for this translation

target_locales.description: The target locales for this translation

fallback_locale.description: The fallback locale for this translation

created.description: The datetime when this translation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this translation was updated

source_locale.description: The source locale for this translation

target_locales.description: The target locales for this translation

fallback_locale.description: The fallback locale for this translation

values.description: Translation values to import. Each object requires an ``id`` (the value block identifier from GET with additional-fields[translation]=values) and a ``translations`` map of target locale codes to translated strings.

id.description: The composite ID of the translation in format {resource_type}::{qualifier}::{collection_id}

source_locale.description: The source locale for this translation

target_locales.description: The target locales for this translation

fallback_locale.description: The fallback locale for this translation

created.description: The datetime when this translation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this translation was updated

id.description: The ID of the universal content

name.description: The name for this universal content

created.description: The datetime when this universal content was created

updated.description: The datetime when this universal content was updated

screenshot_status.description: The status of a universal content screenshot.

details.description: The channel-specific content details for this variation

created.description: The datetime when this variation was created

updated.description: The datetime when this variation was updated

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15.pre/reference/api-overview#authentication
